description: Hand-curated expectations for the pharmacy refill escalation. Values are constraints the synthesis must satisfy, not exact outputs.

required_topics.rationale: Problem 1 of the meeting was a proactive refill-ready notification. Must be picked up.
Problem 2 was patient-scoped delivery so notifications don't go to the wrong household member.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Voice-call reminders were explicitly declined in the meeting.

expected_duplicates.rationale: NS-176 is the in-backlog SMS reminder ticket and was explicitly called out in the meeting as the existing work — any new SMS-refill story should be flagged as a duplicate.

expected_constraint_conflicts.rationale: Surfacing a medication name in a push notification requires explicit patient opt-in, verified delivery, and audit log per HIPAA Section 3 of architecture_constraints.md. Any story that proposes shipping medication-named notifications without those guardrails should be flagged.
